lead:
I'm **Lingadevaru H P**, also known as **Thoshan** — a 22-year-old MCA student at Siddaganga Institute of Technology, Tumakuru, graduating in 2026. I build deployed projects across blockchain, AI/ML, web development, and self-hosted infrastructure, with a career focus on computer networking, cloud computing, and cybersecurity.

I'm deliberately *not* positioning myself as a software developer — my proven strengths are operational: running, deploying, and managing systems. I demonstrate this through live public projects rather than buzzwords: a [[foss-coin|Solana SPL token]] on Orca DEX, a [[thoshan-flash|fine-tuned LLM]] on Hugging Face, an [[insurance-dapp|Ethereum DApp]], and a self-hosted [[homelab|cloud homelab]] architecture.

content.content: My MCA at SIT is structured across four semesters. I spent the **3rd semester** on the [[fraud-detection|Final Year Academic Project]] — an online fraud detection system I built and publicly released on GitHub. The **4th (final) semester** was an internship at CHIAC ASI (Panchasutra Ltd, UK), where I served as Team 8 Lead in Research & Publication and completed all three assigned projects.

content.title: Honest Skills Framework
content.content: Every skill listed here is demonstrated through real deployed work — not just classroom exposure or tutorials. If I haven't shipped something with it, I don't list it.

**Linux & Systems:** I run Arch Linux as a daily driver via [[linux-setup|Omarchy]], DHH's opinionated distro with Hyprland Wayland tiling WM. I'm comfortable with Bash, Git, GitHub, GitLab, Docker, and Kubernetes (exploring).

**Self-Hosting & Deployment:** I deploy and manage containerised services using Docker and Coolify. Services I run include Vaultwarden, SearXNG, Immich, and Pi-hole (see [[homelab|Homelab]]).

**Networking & Security:** I manage Cloudflare DNS, configure WireGuard VPN, run Pi-hole, set up AdGuard Home on my GL.iNet router, configure SPF/DKIM/DMARC email records, and use UFW firewall. All documented in the [[privacy-stack|Privacy Stack]].

**Blockchain / Web3:** I deployed a live Solana SPL token end-to-end ([[foss-coin|FOSS Coin]], live on Orca DEX) and built a fully functional Ethereum smart contract DApp ([[insurance-dapp|Insurance DApp]]).

**AI / ML:** I fine-tuned Google's Gemma-2-9B using QLoRA/PEFT ([[thoshan-flash|Thoshan Flash]], 26+ HF downloads). I also built a custom perceptron-style ML regressor for metro arrival time prediction.

**Media Production:** I use OBS Studio for screen recording (noise gate + RNNoise audio filters) and Shotcut for video editing.

rows.Detail: National-level recognition by the Central Government of India
Elected lead; managed an 80-member team for SIT's flagship technical event
Established and led a 60–80 member community at Seshadripuram College

content.content: I've participated in three hackathons: an **AI Systems Hackathon** (2025, multi-agent autonomous systems), a **24-Hour Rapid Build Challenge** (2025, privacy-focused e-commerce prototype on Tor), and the **NMIT Web3 Hackathon** (2024, decentralised web application prototype).

rows.Description: $FOSS Solana SPL token — live on Orca DEX

content.content:
My primary career target is **Computer Networking, Cloud Computing, and Cybersecurity** — specifically operational and deployment roles rather than software development. This distinction is deliberate: Python makes me uncomfortable; Java was a struggle. My strengths are in running, deploying, and managing systems — not writing application code from scratch.

Evidence-based positioning is a core principle for me: every claim on my portfolio links to a live project, an on-chain transaction, or a GitHub repository — not just a buzzword on a resume.

For the certifications I'm working toward and tools I'm learning, see [[learning-roadmap|Learning Roadmap]].
Skills are proven through live projects, not just theory.
content.author: Personal positioning principle

editHistory.summary: Added GitHub repository table and career direction section
